working_on.feature: Property Sync + Filter System + Edit Subject + Background Transparency + Default Seed Data

recent_changes: db.ts: Added 15 default propertyOptions (4 term, 6 level, 5 type) with auto-seed on app start
ManageExamsScreen: replaced hardcoded dropdown options with useLiveQuery on propertyOptions
PracticeSelectionScreen: merged propertyOptions DB with subject-derived values for filter dropdowns
ExamSelectionScreen: added full filter system to Tự chọn tab (search + examTerm/level/type dropdowns + root toggle)
QuestionBankScreen: rebuilt with full filter system (search + dropdowns + tree/flat list switching)
QuestionDetailScreen: switched to getQuestionsBySubjectRecursive for parent subjects
SubjectTree: added edit subject dialog + export ZIP backup in context menu and dialog
Reduced background opacity across 7 files (/90→/70, /80→/60, opaque→/70)
context_notes: db.seedDefaultProperties() runs on app start, only inserts if table empty
on('populate') seeds on fresh DB creation
getQuestionsBySubjectRecursive uses recursive findChildren to collect all descendant IDs
SubjectTree edit dialog uses useLiveQuery for real-time property options in dropdowns
ZIP export in SubjectTree includes metadata + recursive questions + all images
